seo.metaTitle: PPC Management | White-Label Paid Media for Service Providers | Hostopia
seo.metaDescription: Paid campaigns and ROI — plan, launch, and optimize ads across channels under your brand.

hero.headline: Paid Media That Performs — Under Your Brand
hero.subheadline: SMBs need leads, not complexity. Offer managed paid search and social with clear reporting and guardrails.
hero.description: White-label campaign setup, optimization, and reporting so your customers see ROI while you scale digital revenue without hiring a full ads agency.

items.title: Structured campaigns
items.body: Account architecture, conversion tracking, and budget discipline.

items.title: Ongoing optimization
items.body: Bid, creative, and audience refinements based on performance data.

items.title: Transparent reporting
items.body: Partner-branded dashboards and summaries for stakeholders.

features.heading: Managed Paid — Without the Overhead
features.intro: Operational playbooks and tooling designed for service providers reselling to SMBs.

cards.title: Search & social coverage
cards.body: Campaign types matched to SMB goals and budgets.

cards.title: Performance reporting
cards.body: Clear KPIs, trends, and next-step recommendations.

cards.title: Policy-safe setup
cards.body: Reduce disapprovals and wasted spend with proven templates.

partnerAdvantage.heading: High-Value Digital Upsell
partnerAdvantage.intro: Paid media sits next to websites, SEO, and creative — a natural expansion once SMBs need leads at scale.

items.title: Attach to web launches
items.body: Bundle landing pages with campaigns for faster proof of value.

items.title: Complement SEO
items.body: Own full-funnel: organic plus paid capture.

lifecycleFit.heading: When SMBs Are Ready to Pay for Demand
lifecycleFit.intro: Paid accelerates once the business has a credible site and offer.

steps.title: Get Online
steps.body: Site and hosting ready for traffic.

steps.title: Get Found
steps.body: SEO and listings build baseline demand.

steps.title: Grow
steps.body: PPC and lifecycle marketing scale revenue.

lifecycleFit.positioning: Position PPC as the accelerator for SMBs with proof of product-market fit — sold with landing pages, call tracking, and monthly optimization.
